params.name: Dragon Crystal
params.description:
On Aug 13, 200 AD, a great battle broke out between the good and evil dragons, and the good dragon turned into Dragon Crystals.
The battle between the good and the evil dragons lasted for a century. This was an earth-shattering war that created the base of the current world. The evil dragon turned into the underground world, while the good dragon disintegrated into countless dragon crystals. Every once in a while, a Dragon Crystal Fragment falls on earth.
